title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Sign a Deed of Donation (DOD) to Accept and Receive for and in Favor of the Municipal Government of Los Baños Two (2) Units of Used Fire Trucks From the Bureau of Fire Protection Region Iv-a and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR: HON. JANOS S. LAPIZ, 01/25/2021)
